'''Fa'ale Leh''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Lethan/Legends|Lethan]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]]. She was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] for [[Sienar Advanced Projects Laboratory/Legends|Sienar Advanced Projects Labratory]]. She was the one who flew the [[Scimitar/Legends|''Scimitar'']] to [[Darth Maul/Legends|Darth Maul]]. Afterward, when other members of the team began to be killed off, she fled across the [[Tingel Arm/Legends|Tingel Arm]] - to [[Ryloth/Legends|Ryloth]], [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], and finally [[Naos III/Legends|Naos III]], where she took the name '''Genne'''. She hid there from [[29 BBY/Legends|29]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], becoming an alcoholic [[Naos sharptooth|sharptooth]] collector, until [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] found her just before a group of [[Assassin/Legends|assassins]] did. Although her right lek (singular of [[Lekku/Legends|lekku]]) was shot off, the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] not only managed to get her off Naos alive, but also learned that Maul had had his ship delivered to [[The Works/Legends|The Works]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Labyrinth of Evil]]'' {{1st}}
